patches.summary: Hand-built local-SQLite source adapter (snapshot + FTS5 + typed queries) over Safari's History.db, replacing the HTTP client.
patches.reason: Data source is Safari's local History DB, not an HTTP API — the generator has no local-datastore path yet.

patches.summary: Hand-authored timeline/rabbitholes/dwell/graph/profile/topic commands over the local store (journeys/searches/downloads are capability-gated off for Safari).
patches.reason: Transcendence features over the local store; not generatable from a spec.

patches.summary: Cross-device (origin) partitioning via history_visits.origin (this/synced, binary) + --device filter + devices command.
patches.reason: Safari history includes synced other-device activity; surfaced as a first-class dimension (no per-device identity, unlike Chrome).

patches.summary: icloud-tabs command: deterministic read of synced iCloud tabs (open tabs from the user's other Apple devices) from CloudTabs.db, with --summary per-device counts, --device-name/--pinned filters, no-silent-cap default, and an opt-in --refresh (osascript Safari-activate + --wait) for freshness. Registered as a read-only MCP tool (--refresh excluded from MCP).
patches.reason: CloudTabs.db is a second local Safari datastore (separate from History.db) with no generator path; replaces a calling skill's fragile inline osascript+sqlite and removes the stale-tabs and fabricated-count failure modes. CloudTabs.db only updates while Safari runs, hence the opt-in refresh.
patches.validated_outcome: go build/vet clean; full test suite green incl new cloudtabs fixture + CLI-RunE tests; tiered peer gate (code/test/security/privacy) PASS after fixes — resolved a MAJOR (FDA permission denial now maps to exit 4 via ErrCloudTabsDBPermission wrap in snapshotCloudTabs) and 4 test Blocker/Majors (CLI RunE no-cap-default, RFC3339, summary count-desc, --refresh isolation now mutation-proven via injectable seams); temp snapshot hardened to 0600. Live pure-read returned 55 real iCloud tabs with correct humanization/ordering/no-cap. Peer log: printing-press-workshop/docs/agent-reviews/2026-06-11-safari-history-icloud-tabs-amend-peer-reviews.md

patches.summary: Added opt-in accumulating archive.db store, active-store routing, and sync --accumulate for Safari history.
patches.reason: Safari prunes History.db; the local CLI needs a generated-tree customization to preserve older visits while keeping rich Safari-only reads on the snapshot.

patches.summary: Added archive lifecycle CLI commands and MCP archive status/enable/disable tools.
patches.reason: Completes the accumulating archive customization with human-gated lifecycle operations while keeping destructive clobber/reset/vacuum off MCP.

patches.summary: Fixed archive origin fidelity, snapshot-only visited routing, read-only archive source attaches, atomic FTS rebuilds, and archive-mode output tests.
patches.reason: Peer-gate findings identified silent wrong archive semantics for origin/referrers and insufficient output-level coverage before the unreleased archive feature ships.
patches.validated_outcome: GOFLAGS=-mod=readonly go build ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./internal/..., and gofmt -l on changed Go files all passed.

patches.summary: Changed icloud-tabs stale-data hint to warn when Safari is closed, regardless of tab count, while suppressing on unknown state or --refresh.
patches.reason: CloudTabs.db can contain a non-empty last-synced tab set when Safari is closed, so zero-tab-only hints missed stale data.
patches.validated_outcome: GOFLAGS=-mod=readonly go build ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./internal/..., and gofmt -l on changed Go files all passed; TestICloudTabs_StaleHint mutation-covers closed/running/unknown/refresh gates.

patches.summary: Clarified sync, doctor, MCP, and skill surfaces so agents read existing cached history instead of treating live-source refresh failures as no data.
patches.reason: AQL live eval found agents reflexively synced before reads and refused to answer when the live Safari source was unavailable despite queryable snapshot/archive cache data.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./... passed; peer-test review added write-tool negative steering assertion, archive-enabled doctor coverage, and archive status cached_store branch coverage.

patches.summary: Guarded archive vacuum against creating an empty store, and added a --force guard to archive clobber matching archive reset.
patches.reason: Greptile review: VacuumArchive silently created an empty archive.db (making the CLI's os.IsNotExist guard dead code), and the destructive archive clobber ran without the --force confirmation that the structurally-identical archive reset requires.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./..., gofmt -l, and verify_skill.py all passed; new tests mutation-proven; peer-gated (code+test), no Blocker/Major.
